output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?president ?presidentLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q668 p:P35 ?presidentStatement .
  ?presidentStatement ps:P35 ?president .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?presidentStatement pq:P582 ?endTime
  }
  .
  ?president rdfs:label ?presidentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?presidentLabel) = 'en')
}
